librariesUsed.name: GSAP
librariesUsed.purpose: Marquee chaser light rotation, scroll-triggered stagger reveals for storyboard cells and credit entries

librariesUsed.name: ScrollTrigger
librariesUsed.purpose: GSAP plugin for scroll-driven animation triggers

librariesUsed.name: Canvas Confetti
librariesUsed.purpose: Micro-feedback confetti burst on button clicks for star-rating-pop effect

librariesUsed.name: Splitting.js
librariesUsed.purpose: Per-character text splitting for marquee title glow chase animation

views.name: dashboard
views.viewHint: Movie marquee header with chaser lights, stat cards shaped like ticket stubs, and a film-strip divider between sections.

views.name: projects
views.viewHint: Now-showing/coming-soon split with current projects on the big screen and upcoming ones on poster cards.

views.name: project-workspace
views.viewHint: Widescreen cinematic layout with dark sidebars like theater curtains framing a bright content screen.

views.name: kanban
views.viewHint: Vertical columns styled as movie-theater aisles with ticket-stub cards and marquee column headers.

views.name: whiteboard
views.viewHint: Storyboard canvas with film-frame cells arranged in cinematic sequences with scene numbers.

views.name: schema-planner
views.viewHint: Film credits format with entities as cast lists and relationships as crew credits.

views.name: directory-tree
views.viewHint: Movie credits scroll format with hierarchical indentation and category headers.

views.name: ideas
views.viewHint: Pinterest masonry styled as a wall of movie posters — each idea as a poster with title, tagline, and genre badge.

views.name: ai-chat
views.viewHint: Comic panel layout with dramatic speech bubbles, film-grain texture, and dramatic lighting effects on messages.

views.name: settings
views.viewHint: Projection-room control panel with large labeled switches, dial controls, and grouped equipment sections.

antiRepeatCompliance: Dark purple+neon yellow palette instead of light pastel pink+mint (Pass 1)
Film reel/projector transitions instead of diner jukebox transitions (Pass 1)
Cinematic marquee purple+yellow instead of space-age googie turquoise+coral (Pass 2)
Marquee chaser lights and projector effects instead of atomic orbit animations (Pass 2)
Comic panel chat with film grain instead of diner speech bubble (Pass 1) or space-radio (Pass 2)
